form.formComment: Lining up for just third start. At long odds at debut, tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 2nd of 10 at this track on March 5 over 274m, nose behind Wf Manfredi carrying 57.5kg at $30. Last start 7th of 9 at this track in LR on March 21 over 274m, 2.75 len behind Zazas Hasta Luego with 56kg at $8.30. Genuine contender in this suitable contest.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At debut, 6th of 8 at this track on March 5 over 274m, 2.75 len behind Iam George Iii with 56kg at $18.10. Last start 4th of 9 at this track on March 21 over 229m, 1.5 len behind Splashing Turnpike with 56kg at $12.80. This race is well within his grasp.
